hero.headline: When it breaks, we *fix it right*
hero.subheadline: Akron homeowners trust us with everything from garage siding to basement drains.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Home repair problems, handled
services_section.subheading: From emergency fixes to planned improvements

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Drain clogs, pipe fixes, and water line work. We handle the messy stuff so you don't have to.

services.title: Heating Service
services.description: Furnace repairs and heating system maintenance. Keep your family warm when it matters most.

services.title: Siding & Exterior
services.description: Storm damage, loose siding, and exterior repairs. We show up when the wind takes your garage apart.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: The stuff that breaks around old houses. We've seen it all and know how to fix it.

about.heading: Real fixes for real problems
about.body: We're the Akron team that shows up when your house has issues. No fancy corporate speak — just honest work on everything from basement floods to blown-off siding.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: We'd been searching for a good, reliable plumber for years. When we needed a drain cut into our basement floor, Wilson's came through with solid work.

reviews.name: paula d.
reviews.text: Called Wilson's when siding blew off my garage during high winds. Only company that called back same day, and they showed up even earlier than promised.

reviews.name: Elizabeth B.
reviews.text: Service staff was efficient and professional. Dealt with my concerns in a timely fashion. I'm satisfied and have engaged them for future work.

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Stop dealing with that problem that keeps getting worse. One call gets you a straight answer and fair estimate.
